name: superpowers-editor
description: Publishing editor skills for brainstorming angles, planning proposal reports, and preparing reader-facing writing briefs.

interface.shortDescription: Editorial thinking, planning, and writing-brief skills
interface.longDescription: A local plugin for publishing editors that supports angle exploration, proposal-report planning, and reader-facing writing briefs built from real book materials.
defaultPrompt: Brainstorm 3-5 angles for recommending this book.
Create a proposal plan for this internal proposal report.
Turn this chosen angle into a reader-facing writing brief.
